THE MOVING PARTY SHOULD PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF ITS MOVING PAPERS BY JUNE 18, 2013, WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. Off Calendar Jun-13-2013 Continued To Jun-27-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling RE:COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT WILLIAM DENNIS MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD. The motion is continued to June 27, 2013 to give the moving party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party should provide a courtesy copy of its moving papers by June 18, 2013, with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. The failure to provide the papers may result in the motion being denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JENNIFER D. RHODES OF RHODES & COMPANY, TEL. NO. 946-8825 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendants Business Development and Kassandra Johnson's first amended demurrer to complaint is overruled with ten days to answer. The first, third and fourth causes of action are sufficiently pled and are not so vague or uncertain that demurring parties are unable to respond to the complaint. Order signed in open Court.
